title: ProspectProfile
description: Canonical schema for a LinkedIn outreach prospect. Populated by profile-navigator and referenced by conversation-planner.

id.description: Stable unique identifier derived from the LinkedIn slug. Example: 'alex_chen_softeng'.

linkedin_url.description: Canonical LinkedIn profile URL. Must be the full https:// form.

name.description: Full display name as shown on LinkedIn.

title.description: Current job title as listed on LinkedIn headline.

location.description: Location string from LinkedIn profile (city, state/country).

connection_degree.description: LinkedIn connection degree at time of last profile visit. null if unknown.

mutual_connections.description: Names of shared connections visible on LinkedIn.

recent_posts.description: Up to 5 most recent posts scraped from the activity feed.

timestamp.description: Post date. ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) or LinkedIn relative label ('2 weeks ago').

connection_status.description: Current LinkedIn connection status observed during the last profile visit.

outreach_stage.description: High-level stage of this prospect in the outreach funnel. Must stay in sync with the companion conversation file.

target_action.description: The ultimate goal for this outreach sequence.

notes.description: Free-form operator notes: signals from activity feed, context on openness to roles, prior offline contact, etc.

profile_fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last profile-navigator run for this prospect.
